title: Style Dictionary Documentation
content: # Style Dictionary ## Live Demo Export your Design Tokens to any platform - iOS, Android, CSS, JS, HTML, sketch files, style documentation, or anything you can think of. Forward-compatible with . Below is a showcase of how a set of DTCG tokens would be exported to CSS: Upload your JSON or ZIP of tokens and convert them to DTCG format: ## Links [Design Tokens Community Group spec](https://tr.designtokens.org/format/) [Documentation](/getting-started/installation) [Migration to Version 4](/versions/v4/migration/) [GitHub](https://github.com/style-dictionary/style-dictionary) [v3 docs](https://v3.styledictionary.com) [Read more about DTCG](/info/dtcg/)
